impact: Provides the committed placeholder user-case data needed to validate that PP&D can derive missing reversible request fields from a public process fixture without storing PII, account state, screenshots, traces, uploads, or private artifacts.
summary: Add a minimal redacted missing-information fixture for the existing fixture-only missing-information schema test.
target_task: Task checkbox-47: Task checkbox-42: Add the smallest committed missing-information fixture for checkbox-41 using placeholder user case facts and public-only citations. Do not store PII, account state, screenshots, traces, or uploads.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
